Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Defendants Discovery Requests; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Aron Liang, Esq. 925-225-6838) for Defendant/moving party DESIRAE MURATA.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DESIRAE MURATA's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Defendants Discovery Requests; Request For Monetary Sanctions.

The unopposed motion of Defendant Murata to compel Plaintiff Green to respond to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Requests for Production, and for discovery sanctions, is granted. Plaintiff Green shall serve verified code compliant responses (without objections other than with respect to privileged matters) to Defendant Murata's Form Interrogatories (Set One), Special Interrogatories (Set One), and Request for Production of Documents (Set One), all dated August 10, 2017, and pay Defendant Murat's counsel discovery sanctions of $322.84, within ten (10) dates of service on Plaintiff Green of notice of entry of this order.

Order is signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2017 Set For Trial On Apr-16-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
